introSection: Vapor Trail is a Vekoma roller coaster located at Sesame Place Philadelphia in Langhorne, Pennsylvania, USA. Opened in 1998, it was the park's first and only roller coaster until the opening of Oscar's Wacky Taxi in 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Vapor Trail a Family Coaster installation by Vekoma with a custom layout.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Originally painted white with blue supports, the track was repainted light blue for 2004.

fullText:
Vapor Trail is a Vekoma roller coaster located at Sesame Place Philadelphia in Langhorne, Pennsylvania, USA. Opened in 1998, it was the park's first and only roller coaster until the opening of Oscar's Wacky Taxi in 2018.

Vapor Trail a Family Coaster installation by Vekoma with a custom layout.

Originally painted white with blue supports, the track was repainted light blue for 2004.
